headline: HP (HPQ) Stock After Recent Rally Is The Valuation Gap Closing?
summary: If you are wondering whether HP's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this article walks through what the numbers are actually saying. HP's stock has been mixed in recent periods, with the price falling 1.3% over the last week, rising 18.7% over the last month, and delivering returns of 14.1% year to date and 11.3% over the past year. These moves sit against a backdrop where sustained interest in HP keeps the stock on many watchlists, as investors consider how the company...
